name: Refat
professionalIntro: Hi, I'm Arif Ahmed Refat, a passionate Full Stack Web Developer, Software Engineer, and AI Developer with a strong background in creating dynamic and responsive web applications. My journey in web development started with a curiosity about how websites work, and it has evolved into a deep passion for building exceptional digital experiences. I specialize in React.js, Node.js, WordPress, and AI development. My goal is to create clean, efficient, and user-friendly applications that solve real-world problems.
